title: glandularia stellarioides
intro: Glandularia stellarioides, also known as Purple Sage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Verbena family. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Glandularia stellarioides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on individual circumstances.
